title: Paul Merryck Lager Jus
description: Lager Jus – 25 Glorious Years of the 21st Century For all of you who think the old 2000s so far has been a bit shit – think again! From Richard Madeley’s Millenium Cupboard to the new series of Pro-Celebrity Dogging, the 21st Century has been an absolute delight. It’s been an amazing time too for veteran Essex Comedian Paul Merryck, so join him as he takes you on a journey through time, joyously and tenuously intertwining seismic global changes with the continuous unravelling of his ridiculous life. WARNING: Unlike many fringe shows, there’s no profound message or meaning that will gradually reveal itself as the show progresses, teaching you something about the performer, the world and, perhaps, yourself. On the contrary, you’ll learn absolutely nothing and may leave the show a little bit thicker than when you came in. There are lots and lots of jokes though. “gag-focussed delivery... . high laugh rate... . you’d think that the spirit of Mike Reid is alive and well” Chortle

venue.name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
